name: Nobelium
appearance: Nobelium is a radioactive metal. Only a few atoms have ever been made. Its half-life is only 58 minutes.
uses: Nobelium has no uses outside research.
naturalAbundance: Nobelium is made by bombarding curium with carbon in a device called a cyclotron.
biologicalRole: Nobelium has no known biological role. It is toxic due to its radioactivity.
